name: Commercator :LCS (Hai)
description: The Louise Conglomerate never paid attention to build midsized freighters, hence the Commercator class plays right away in the heavy league. An immediate success, it became the backbone of the Space Hansa trading convoys but also a popular choice for mining expeditions. The numerous turret mounts make it a rather risky target for pirates, while still keeping to the doctrine of smooth escapes.

name: Lectica :LCS (Hai)
description: The Lectica is an upper class interstellar shuttle popular among wealthy businessmen from the Paradise worlds. Though the only ship model not explicitly designed for use in the frontier regions, it nevertheless sports an unproportional amount of armament to fend off kidnapping attempts on its own until an escape to hyperspace.

name: Mercator :LCS (Hai)
description: The Mercator class is the choice of senior merchants and Paradise world patricians. Just looking at its technical characteristics can cause megalomania. It competes with the Senator class for being Louise's flagship class, separating the Louise fandom into two groups which can endlessly discuss the advantages of their beloved ship class in every detail, criticizing randomly anything of the other.

name: Venditor :LCS (Hai)
description: The Venditor class is Louise Conglomerate's risk-zone alternative to the common dull Syndicate freighter without a proper name that is more popular on the peaceful inner trade lanes and which not even has a proper name. The Venditor was designed under the premise that a light freighter should be able to flee quickly into hyperspace, instead of risking a fight it would likely loose anyway. Nevertheless there are stories about daring junior traders who mount blaster turrets instead of anti-missile ones, and go into counterattacks or even hunt smaller pirate parties. Not the smartest thing to do, but well, you know those youngsters.

name: Antecursor :LCS (Atomic Proton)
description: Built for speed, the Louise Conglomerate's Antecursor class is employed to aggressively intercept dubious ships before they can pose a threat to the convoy it is protecting. Would-be pirates often mistake the two drone bays for cargo containers, an error they pay dearly for. The only pure warship built by Louise shipyards.

name: Antecursor :LCS (Heavy Rocket)
description: Built for speed, the Louise Conglomerate's Antecursor class is employed to aggressively intercept dubious ships before they can pose a threat to the convoy it is protecting. Would-be pirates often mistake the two drone bays for cargo containers, an error they pay dearly for. The only pure warship built by Louise shipyards.

name: Bellator :LCS (Heavy Rocket)
description: The Bellator is a Mining Drone with two subtle modifications -- an additional gun port, and increased endurance allowing it to continue fighting when a regular Mining Drone would already be disabled. An astonishingly effective device enshadowing the Navy Combat Drone which makes any pirate regret his career choice as soon as being confronted with a wall of projectiles when attacking a convoy equipped with them. 	Drones do not come equipped with a hyperdrive. You cannot carry a drone unless you have a ship in your fleet with a drone bay.

name: Commercator :LCS (Atomic Proton)

The numerous turret mounts make it a rather risky target for pirates, while still keeping to the doctrine of smooth escapes.

name: Commercator :LCS (Miner)
description: The Louise Conglomerate never paid attention to build midsized freighters, hence the Commercator class plays right away in the heavy league. An immediate success, it became the backbone of the Space Hansa trading convoys but also a popular choice for mining expeditions. The numerous turret mounts make it a rather risky target for pirates, while still keeping to the doctrine of smooth escapes.

name: Explorator :LCS (Atomic)
description: Louise Conglomerate's Explorator class is a versatile design suited for high risk jobs at the edge of civilized space, being able to haul cargo and be a maneuverable combat ship at the same time, greeting pirates with a hailstorm of missiles. Popular among explorers and prospectors as well as traders outside the main trade lanes.

name: Explorator :LCS (Miner)
description: Louise Conglomerate's Explorator class is a versatile design suited for high risk jobs at the edge of civilized space, being able to haul cargo and be a maneuverable combat ship at the same time, greeting pirates with a hailstorm of missiles. Popular among explorers and prospectors as well as traders outside the main trade lanes.

name: Gradator :LCS (Particle)
description: The Louise Conglomerate and Lionheart Industries became interested to enter the market for interceptors at about the same time, but faced a market that was already shared among the traditional manufacturers. Hence they decided to unite Lionheart's experience in lightweight design and Louise's mass production capabilities and privileged distribution channel to the Space Hansa. 	The result was project "Strider", a long-range interceptor of unseen speed and agility at a reasonable price which surpassed all expectations. Only months after the first flight serial production started at the Louise shipyards under the name "Gradator", in corporate-style Neo-Latin. 	Typically deployed in groups of three, flown by pilots trained in the same centres of Lionheart as Dagger pilots and pouncing at attackers like furious hornets, the Gradator soon earned the nickname "Degradator" by friends and foes likewise.

name: Gradator :LCS (Sidewinder)
description: The Louise Conglomerate and Lionheart Industries became interested to enter the market for interceptors at about the same time, but faced a market that was already shared among the traditional manufacturers. name: Messor :LCS (Atomic Gunboat)
description: In order to capitalize on the abundant minerals hidden in asteroids, the Messor class has a sizable cargo bay and enough gun ports to make the mining process fast and efficient. More robust than the Sunder, it is well suited for the Pirate-infested frontier areas, where the most promising prospect areas wait. Sometimes Messors are also used as agile gunboats.

name: Senator :LCS (Atomic Proton)
description: Made to transport valuable cargo across hostile space, Louise Conglomerate's Senator class packs enough firepower to fend for itself, serving as a de facto merchant cruiser. It competes with the Mercator class for being Louise's flagship class, separating the Louise fandom into two groups which can endlessly discuss the advantages of their beloved ship class in every detail, criticizing randomly anything of the other.
